findings.title: 🚨 CVE-2026-20963 — Microsoft SharePoint RCE via Deserialization Added to CISA KEV, 3-Day Patch Deadline Expires 2026-03-21
findings.cvss: High/Critical (NVD pending; CISA: network-accessible unauthenticated RCE)
findings.affected_technology: Microsoft SharePoint (all on-premises versions; patch per Microsoft advisory)
findings.summary: CISA added CVE-2026-20963 (SharePoint deserialization RCE) to KEV on 2026-03-18 with emergency 3-day deadline (due 2026-03-21); unauthenticated network attacker achieves code execution; EPSS 1.63% (81.7th pct); treat as P0 and patch immediately.

findings.title: CVE-2025-32463 — Sudo chroot Privilege Escalation to Root on Linux (CVSS 9.3, EPSS 26.5%, Multiple PoCs Live)
findings.affected_technology: sudo 1.9.14 through 1.9.17 (all patch revisions) on Ubuntu, RHEL, SUSE, Debian and most Linux distributions
findings.summary: sudo -R flag allows any sudo-privileged user to spawn a root shell on affected Linux systems (sudo 1.9.14–1.9.17); CVSS 9.3; EPSS 26.52% (96.3rd pct); 950+ GitHub stars across 3 PoC repos since yesterday; upgrade to sudo >=1.9.17p1 immediately.

findings.title: CVE-2025-66376 — Zimbra ZCS CSS @import XSS Exploited in Wild, Added to CISA KEV (Due 2026-04-01)
findings.affected_technology: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Classic UI — all versions prior to vendor-patched build
findings.summary: Attackers embed CSS @import directives in HTML email to trigger XSS in Zimbra Classic UI, stealing session tokens; CISA confirmed active exploitation; added to KEV 2026-03-18, due 2026-04-01; apply Zimbra patch immediately.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3564 — ConnectWise ScreenConnect Cryptographic Signature Verification Bypass, Machine Key Abuse Observed
findings.affected_technology: ConnectWise ScreenConnect (on-premises deployments prior to version 26.1)
findings.summary: ScreenConnect cryptographic signature bypass enables session hijacking; researchers observe ASP.NET machine key abuse attempts targeting on-prem ScreenConnect deployments; MSPs are high-value supply-chain targets; update to version 26.1 immediately.

findings.title: 9 CVEs in IP KVM Devices — Two Unfixed CVSS 9.8/8.8 Flaws in Angeet ES3 KVM Enable Unauthenticated Root Access
findings.cvss: 9.8 (CVE-2026-32297, no fix); 8.8 (CVE-2026-32298, no fix); 7.2–8.3 (others, fixes available)
findings.affected_technology: Angeet/Yeeso ES3 KVM (NO FIX), GL-iNet Comet RM-1, Sipeed NanoKVM, JetKVM
findings.summary: Researchers disclosed 9 IP KVM vulnerabilities across 4 vendors; CVE-2026-32297 (CVSS 9.8, no fix) and CVE-2026-32298 (CVSS 8.8, no fix) in Angeet/Yeeso ES3 KVM allow unauthenticated root access — network-isolate all IP KVM management ports.

findings.title: Apple WebKit CVE-2026-20643 — Same-Origin Policy Bypass Patched via New 'Background Security Improvements' Mechanism
findings.cvss: High (Apple rated: 'may allow a remote attacker to break out of Web Content sandbox')
findings.affected_technology: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Safari — patched via Background Security Improvements update (March 11, 2026)
findings.summary: Apple silently patched WebKit CVE-2026-20643 via its first-ever Background Security Improvements push (2026-03-11); flaw allows remote SOP bypass and Web Content sandbox escape; verify all managed Apple devices received the update via MDM.

findings.title: INTEL UPDATE: Interlock Ransomware Exploited Cisco FMC (CVE-2026-20131) as Zero-Day for 36 Days Before Patch
findings.affected_technology: Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) — all versions prior to 7.4.2 (patched March 4, 2026)
findings.summary: Amazon/AWS confirmed Interlock ransomware exploited Cisco FMC CVE-2026-20131 as a zero-day from January 26 — 36 days before the March 4 patch; any FMC unpatched before March 4 should be forensically investigated and all credentials rotated.

noted.summary: Unauthenticated RCE vulnerability with public exploit tool (22 GitHub stars); EPSS 2.64% (85.5th percentile); limited enterprise exposure given niche tooling.
Stored XSS (CVE-2026-24769) and unvalidated redirect (CVE-2026-24768) from GitHub Security Lab; low EPSS (0.017%); no active exploitation observed; update to latest version.

AjaxProxy deserialization RCE vulnerability — added to CISA KEV 2026-03-09 with due date 2026-03-12 (expired); late catch; any outstanding SolarWinds Web Help Desk deployments should have patched by now.

noted.product: DarkSword iOS Exploit Kit (state-sponsored spyware vendor)
noted.summary: Newly identified iOS exploit kit used in infostealer attacks targeting individuals — chains 6 iOS/WebKit vulnerabilities for full device compromise; primarily targeting journalists, executives, diplomats; no enterprise network vector.
4th known bypass of WhatsApp's View Once feature (modified client saves one-time media before deletion); Meta will not patch; operational security concern for sensitive communications over WhatsApp.
